summary: Experienced audit professional with 9 years at KPMG London, currently Audit Manager in the Financial Services practice. Specialises in banking and fintech engagements, having led audits for 6 FCA-regulated fintech firms including e-money institutions and payment service providers. ACA qualified (ICAEW) with CISA certification. Hands-on experience with SOC 2 attestation, PSD2 compliance auditing, cloud infrastructure assessment, and technology risk evaluation across financial services.

experience.title: Audit Manager — Financial Services
bullets: Led external audit engagements for 6 FCA-regulated fintech clients including e-money institutions, payment service providers, and challenger banks
Managed audit teams of 4-8 staff across planning, fieldwork, and completion phases for clients with revenues up to GBP 500M
Executed SOC 2 Type II attestation engagements for 3 cloud-native fintech platforms hosted on AWS infrastructure
Assessed PSD2 safeguarding compliance and EMR/PSR safeguarding requirements across 4 annual audit cycles for e-money and payment institution clients
Developed KPMG's fintech audit methodology for e-money and payment institution engagements, adopted across the UK Financial Services practice

experience.title: Assistant Manager / Audit Senior (promoted from Associate 2018, to Assistant Manager 2020)
bullets: Progressed from graduate associate to assistant manager on banking and insurance audit engagements
Performed IT general controls testing (ITGC) across core banking platforms including Temenos Transact and Finastra
Supported 2 AML/KYC compliance audits for mid-tier UK banks, assessing transaction monitoring and customer due diligence controls
Achieved ACA qualification (ICAEW) in 2019 and CISA certification in 2020

certifications: ACA — Institute of Chartered Accountants in England and Wales (ICAEW, 2019)
